fixes.name: fallback_non_compliant final validator
behavior: Adds a pure final optimizer result validator.
Checks weight finiteness, negativity, sum-to-one, missing used_asset weights and bucket bound violations.
Fallback results that fail final constraints now return status=fallback_non_compliant with applicable=false and usable=false.

fixes.name: missing exposure guard
behavior: Conservative profiles 1-4 block funds with classification_v2 but no usable portfolio_exposure_v2/economic exposure.
Higher profiles emit a warning path instead of silently interpreting missing exposure as 0 percent equity.

fixes.name: negative weights guard
behavior: _normalize now clamps non-finite and negative values to zero before calculating the denominator.
Solver post-processing rejects significant negative or non-finite cleaned weights before final normalization.

fixes.name: used_assets weights completeness
behavior: Returned weights now include every used_asset in addition to originally requested assets.
Final validator reports MISSING_USED_ASSET_WEIGHT if a used asset is absent from the internal final weight vector.

fixes.name: frontend fallback_non_compliant gating
behavior: Only optimal_compliant, optimal_with_warnings and fallback_compliant may open the review/apply flow.
fallback_non_compliant or usable/applicable=false stores explainability, shows an error and returns before setProposedPortfolio.
